driving-and-transport.name: Driving and transport
driving-and-transport.description: Register, transfer or change a vehicle, import a car, get a vehicle inspection, and other things you do with the Barbados Licensing Authority.

national-insurance-and-benefits.name: National Insurance and benefits
national-insurance-and-benefits.description: Apply for pensions and benefits, register with the NIS, set up direct deposit and prove your status to keep payments coming.

firearms.name: Firearms
firearms.description: Apply for a firearm licence, a dealer or gunsmith licence, a shooting club licence, or to import or export a firearm.

safety-and-public-events.name: Safety and public events
safety-and-public-events.description: Get a police accident report, a permit for a march or motorcade, or a loud music permit for an event.

business-and-companies.name: Business and companies
business-and-companies.description: Register a company, file company changes with Corporate Affairs, appoint a registered agent and other company services.

trade-exports-and-imports.name: Trade, exports and imports
trade-exports-and-imports.description: Apply for a certificate of origin to export goods under a trade agreement, or make a complaint about your treatment at a Caribbean port of entry.

youth-and-community.name: Youth and community programmes
youth-and-community.description: Apply to a Ministry of Youth programme – BYAC, Get Hired, Pathways, Youth Entrepreneurship Scheme, summer camp and arts programmes.

services.title: Register or renew a vehicle
services.description: Register a vehicle for the first time, or renew its registration each year.

services.title: Apply to import a vehicle
services.description: Get permission to bring a car, truck or motorcycle into Barbados.

services.title: Get a vehicle inspection
services.description: Book a Barbados Licensing Authority inspection to check that a vehicle is roadworthy.

services.title: Tell us you have sold a vehicle
services.description: Inform the Barbados Licensing Authority when you sell a vehicle, on your own or with co-owners.

services.title: Transfer a vehicle (no money exchanged)
services.description: Tell the Barbados Licensing Authority you have transferred ownership of a vehicle without money changing hands.

services.title: Change the colour of your vehicle
services.description: Tell the Barbados Licensing Authority before you change the colour of your vehicle.

services.title: Change the engine in your vehicle
services.description: Tell the Barbados Licensing Authority after you change the engine in your vehicle.

services.title: Change how you use your vehicle
services.description: Tell the Barbados Licensing Authority if you change how your vehicle is used – for example, from private to commercial.

services.title: Apply for a vehicle investigation
services.description: Ask the Barbados Licensing Authority to investigate a vehicle that is off the road.

services.title: Apply for a vanity plate
services.description: Apply for a personalised vanity number plate for your vehicle.

services.title: Keep your registration number
services.description: Ask to keep your vehicle’s registration number after the vehicle is off the road.

services.title: Scrap or sell a vehicle in parts
services.description: Tell the Barbados Licensing Authority that your vehicle has been permanently taken off the road.

services.title: Request graphics or lettering on a vehicle
services.description: Get permission before you put graphics or lettering on a vehicle.

services.title: Apply for a duty-free vehicle concession
services.description: Ask to bring in a vehicle without paying customs duty. Available for some individuals and businesses.

services.title: Pay the Alternate Fuel Levy
services.description: Pay the monthly or annual levy for vehicles that are not powered by petrol or diesel.

services.title: Register a vehicle for a temporary stay in Barbados
services.description: Apply for an International Circulation Permit if you are bringing a vehicle into Barbados for a short stay.

services.title: Make a business declaration for vehicle ownership
services.description: Companies, partnerships and sole traders must declare who controls a business-owned vehicle.

services.title: Get a vehicle registration summary
services.description: Get a one-page summary of a vehicle’s registration status for a sale or import.

services.title: Claim Old Age Contributory Pension
services.description: Claim a pension from the National Insurance Office once you reach pension age.

services.title: Claim unemployment benefit
services.description: Claim a weekly payment from the National Insurance Office while you look for work.

services.title: Get a termination of services or layoff certificate
services.description: Employers complete this form to give to a worker who has stopped working.

services.title: Set up direct deposit for NIS payments
services.description: Have your National Insurance benefit paid directly into your bank or credit union account.

services.title: Confirm a student’s educational status for NIS
services.description: Used to keep paying a Survivors’ or Death Benefit to a student aged 16 to 25.

services.title: Send a life certificate
services.description: People claiming an NIS pension must confirm they are alive every six months.

services.title: Get a Contributions Payment Certificate (self-employed)
services.description: Self-employed people can ask for a certificate showing the NIS contributions they have paid.

services.title: Register for Online Social Security (employee)
services.description: Open an online account with the NIS so you can check your record, change your details and apply for benefits.

services.title: Register for Online Social Security (employer)
services.description: Open an online employer account with the NIS so you can pay contributions and report new hires.

services.title: Get a DP-10 contributions certificate
services.description: A summary of the National Insurance contributions paid for an employee during a tax year.

services.title: Apply for a firearm licence
services.description: Apply for a licence to have, use or carry a firearm in Barbados.

services.title: Apply for a licence to import or export a firearm
services.description: Apply to bring a firearm into Barbados or send one out of the country.

services.title: Apply for a firearms dealer, gunsmith or collector’s licence
services.description: Apply for a licence to operate as a firearms dealer, a gunsmith or a collector.

services.title: Apply for a shooting club licence
services.description: Apply for a licence so a shooting club can operate in Barbados.

services.title: Apply for a march, walk, run or motorcade permit
services.description: Get police permission to hold a march, walk, run or motorcade on public roads.

services.title: Get a police accident report
services.description: Get a copy of the police report for a road traffic accident.

services.title: Apply for a loud music permit
services.description: Get police permission to play loud music at an event or in a public place.

services.title: Register a domestic company
services.description: Set up a Barbadian company under the Companies Act, Cap. 308.

services.title: Register an International Business Company
services.description: Set up an International Business Company (IBC) in Barbados.

services.title: Register a non-profit company
services.description: Set up a Barbadian non-profit company under the Companies Act, Cap. 308.

services.title: File articles of reincorporation
services.description: Re-state a company under the current Companies Act of Barbados.

services.title: Cancel an external company
services.description: Tell CAIPO that an external (foreign) company is no longer doing business in Barbados.

services.title: Register a corporate agent
services.description: Register or update the details of an agent acting for a Barbadian company.

services.title: Authorise a geographical indications agent
services.description: Appoint an agent to act for you in a geographical indications matter under Cap. 320.

services.title: Make a URL ownership declaration
services.description: Declare that you legally own a website domain (URL) registered to your company.

services.title: Make a financial declaration
services.description: Public officials and other named people must declare their assets, liabilities and income every year.

services.title: Apply for a CARICOM certificate of origin
services.description: Get a certificate showing that your goods qualify for CARICOM Single Market preferential treatment.

services.title: Apply for a CARICOM–Colombia certificate of origin
services.description: Get a certificate of origin under the CARICOM–Colombia trade agreement.

services.title: Apply for a CARICOM–Costa Rica certificate of origin
services.description: Get a certificate of origin under the CARICOM–Costa Rica Free Trade Agreement.

services.title: Apply for a CARICOM–Dominican Republic certificate of origin
services.description: Get a certificate of origin under the CARICOM–Dominican Republic Free Trade Agreement.

services.title: Apply for an EUR.1 movement certificate
services.description: Get an EUR.1 certificate to claim preferential treatment when exporting to the European Union.

services.title: Apply for a BIDC certificate of origin
services.description: Apply for a Barbados Investment and Development Corporation certificate of origin for any export.

services.title: Make a CSME point of entry complaint
services.description: Tell CARICOM if you were treated unfairly at a port of entry or departure under the CSME.

services.title: Apply for the Barbados YouthADVANCE Corps (BYAC)
services.description: Apply to join the Barbados YouthADVANCE Corps, a Ministry of Youth training and service programme.

services.title: Submit a BYAC health assessment
services.description: A doctor must complete a health assessment for everyone applying to BYAC.

services.title: Submit a BYAC reference form
services.description: Referees complete a reference form for someone applying to BYAC.

services.title: Apply for the Get Hired Programme
services.description: Apply for the 2026 Get Hired Programme – a Ministry of Youth jobs and employability programme.

services.title: Apply for the Pathways Employability Programme
services.description: Apply for the 2026 Pathways Employability Programme – a Ministry of Youth scheme that helps young people get ready for work.

services.title: Make first contact with the Youth Entrepreneurship Scheme
services.description: Tell the Youth Entrepreneurship Scheme (YES) about your business idea so they can offer support.

services.title: Register a camper for the National Summer Camp Programme
services.description: Register a child aged 7 to 12 for the National Summer Camp Programme.

services.title: Register for the National Community Cultural Training Programme
services.description: Register for a 2025 community-based cultural training course.

services.title: Register for Youth Achieving Results (Performing Arts)
services.description: Register a young performer for the Youth Achieving Results performing arts programme.

services.title: Register for Youth Achieving Results (Visual Arts)
services.description: Register a young visual artist for the Youth Achieving Results visual arts programme.

services.title: Register for the Youth MC Training Programme
services.description: Apply to train as an MC, presenter or radio host on the Youth MC Training Programme.
